# WSO2 Email Group Manager

## Introduction

The purpose of this application is to manage users' email group subscriptions conveniently.  
This application was developed by the WSO2 Internal Apps Team.

## Get started

Click on the link below to get started with ‘WSO2 Email Group Manager’  
[https://](https://apps-store.wso2.com)[email-group-manager.wso2.com](http://email-group-manager.wso2.com/)

## All Groups Tab

This is the first page you will see when you log in to the application. It will list all of the default, public, and private email groups that you have already subscribed to and you can subscribe to.

![][image1]

You can search for a particular email group through the search bar.  
![][image2]

Click on the subscribe button to subscribe to the email group.
![][image3]

## Default Groups Tab

This tab will list all of the default email groups that are related to you. You won’t be able to make amendments to the list of default email groups.

![][image4]

## Public Groups Tab

This tab will list all of the public email groups that you have already subscribed to and you can subscribe to.

![][image5]

## Private Groups Tab

This tab will list all of the private email groups that you have been subscribed to.

![][image6]
